home_subtitle: Use Cmd/Ctrl + K to switch between route navigation and assistant planning. Try prompts such as "Create a new product named Solar Bottle" or "Open my cart and checkout".
home_shortcut: Open the command palette with Cmd/Ctrl + K.
home_storybook_prefix: If you want the Storybook documentation, run
catalog_page_subtitle: Browse the demo catalog and jump into the cart flow.
catalog_highlight_empty: No assistant highlight is active on this page yet.
product_create_page_subtitle: This form accepts assistant-prefilled values through route query params.
product_create_form_hint: Use the assistant to prefill name, category, price, stock, or description, then save the product into the demo catalog.
cart_page_subtitle: Review the current cart and continue to checkout.
cart_focus_banner: The demo cart was updated with "{name}" and quantity {quantity}.
cart_focus_empty: No assistant focus is active on the cart.
checkout_page_subtitle: Final review before completing the purchase flow.
